library_preparation_preflight.summary: No extra dependency or Docker image is needed, but deterministic tests for the settings builder should isolate Maven settings locations with system properties.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: For meaningful coverage of `DefaultMavenSettingsBuilder`, create temporary user/global `settings.xml` files and a temporary local repository, then set `org.apache.maven.user-settings`, `org.apache.maven.global-settings`, and `maven.repo.local` before constructing/initializing the builder; restore properties afterward. Avoid relying on the host `${user.home}/.m2/settings.xml` or `${maven.home}/conf/settings.xml`. `SettingsXpp3Reader`, `SettingsXpp3Writer`, and model classes can be tested with in-memory XML and do not need external setup.
risks: The builder falls back to host Maven settings paths and can create/use a local repository path if `maven.repo.local` is not set.
`DefaultMavenSettingsBuilder.userHome` is a static field captured at class load, so tests should prefer the explicit Maven override properties instead of changing `user.home` late.
Using Plexus component lookup instead of direct construction may add reflective/container behavior; direct API use is simpler unless the test specifically targets Plexus integration.
